result.notes: 4 genuine negatives (B409, B411, B418, B428), all computed-in-arc (scripts + committed JSONs verified in dirs) so no P1s. 4 mis-classed non-negatives: B412 (positive reframe), B433 (verified calibration), B435/B437 (corrections/retractions inside positive arcs).

4 true negatives (B52, B56, B59, B66), all computed-in-arc with committed probe scripts, so no P1s. 4 atlas mis-classes: B57 proof-module, B58 untested (NEEDS-EXPERTISE), B60 barrier retracted by B61 update, B62 confirmed-live. B59/B66 kills are numerical only; symbolic trace ring (B58) still open.

3 true negatives (B192, B225, B237); 5 atlas mis-classes (B200, B214, B219, B239 positive/correction arcs; B216 a negative itself overturned by B219). B225 flagged P1: its base-rate kill reads bad primes off the branch-locus discriminant, a proxy that overcounts at genus>=2.

5 true negatives (B243, B247, B252, B294, B295), all with in-arc or one-hop-verified computations (B294 -> B288 census checked), so 0 P1. 3 atlas mis-classes: B272 and B296 are verification records, B285 a verified positive with a retraction keyword.

6 true negatives, all computed-in-arc (scripts+committed artifacts verified in each dir) so no P1s. 2 mis-classed: B372 (seam-persists discovery, null refuted positively) and B373 (E17 data arc; its only kill content corrected by B374). B392 one-hop to B347: computation found there.

4/8 mis-classed positives (B332, B334 incl. explicit B401 vindication, B360, B361 - keyword mining hit corrections/refuted intermediates). 4 genuine negatives (B335, B343, B364, B365), all computed-in-arc with committed reproducers, so no P1s; all pre-B735, none consulted the spectral face.

All 8 genuine negatives; strong batch — every kill has committed scripts/JSON artifacts + test locks. 6 computed-in-arc; B401/B403 computed-in-cited-arc (B398 hop verified: {7,5}/2304, 49, 13 computed there). No P1. B399/B400/B401 grounded as walls; B401 is a subsidiary kill in a positive arc.

2 mis-classed (B525 meta-audit, B553 harvest w/ corrected deflation). 6 true negatives, all with in-arc or one-hop-verified computations (B550 hardcodes B111-locked tower; B111 probe.py computes it) — zero P1. No pre-B735 kill consulted the spectral face.

6 true negatives, all with in-arc/one-hop-verified computations (no P1). B459 and B472 are atlas mis-classes: positive verification/correction arcs, not kills. B444 filed authority-external per pick-weaker rule (Maclachlan-Reid/Falbel leg); B734 congruence tower is its natural revival control.

All 8 are genuine banked negatives (several mixed arcs with verified+refuted parts). All kills computed-in-arc (scripts verified present with the discriminating computations); B307 torn vs authority-external (Maclachlan-Reid lemma), noted. No P1s. None consulted the spectral face.

6 genuine negatives, all with in-arc probe.py computations (5 computed-in-arc). B107's kill is a genericity/category bridge on a computed single-scale proxy -> P1. B111 and B120 are keyword mis-classes: positive/correction arcs, not banked negatives. No pre-B735 kill consulted the spectral face.

3 mis-classes (B474 positive law arc, B477 open recon, B483 positive Fibonacci-face arc). 5 true kills: B476/B486 computed-in-arc; B484/B487 authority-external; B489 P1 (proxy: abelian UV DGG rank read as enhancement check, contradicted by B487's own T[4_1] flavor-enhancement fact).

B515 mis-classed (positive correction arc, is_negative=false). P1s: B500 kill rests on 77% census (proxy); B516 dim-5 counterexample has no artifact/numbers (asserted); B521 gate-seal legs cited to absent oaudit clone (cited-unverified). B513 recorded as tombstone; B521 as wall.

Only 2/8 are real negatives (B604 assignment-nonexistence, B619 A5 bridge value-mismatch); both computed-in-arc with committed scripts+outputs, so no P1. The other 6 (B605, B624, B626, B632, B654, B656) are correction/positive arcs mis-mined from REFUTED/killed keywords.

B731 and B734 are atlas mis-classes (B731's negative was retracted by B734; B734 is a positive correction arc). B736 is a genuine banked negative (observer obstructed + SM-reduction no-go), fully computed-in-arc (scripts + committed outputs), sandbox-recomputable, not P1.

6 true negatives (B558/B561/B567/B569/B572/B574), all locked in-arc (B558 levels 0-1 one-hop verified in B533/B539); no P1s. 2 mis-classed: B579 (corrections in positive adjudication arc), B585 (positive law arc; REFUTED = internal mechanism candidate).

4 of 8 are atlas mis-classes (B657, B664, B672, B681: positive/pass arcs with kill vocabulary). True negatives: B668 (computed-in-cited-arc, B662/G), B669 and B677 (computed-in-arc), B685 P1 (GSWZ external + 'W2 kill #8' not located in one hop -> cited-unverified).

6 true negatives; 2 mis-classed (B703 correction arc, B705 positive law arc). P1: B687 only - the SM-atlas base-rate kill cites a1_atlas.json that is not committed and the ~20-golden-values count has no artifact. B709's B701 cite resolves to B700's sage computation; others computed-in-arc.

6 genuine negatives; B132 & B154 are is_negative=false (positive/self-correction arcs mis-mined by atlas). Only B146 is P1: its handedness firewall rests on a POSTULATED characterization (asserted), bare-math verified but the generalization unproven. 4 P1s: all Chat-2 "standard-theory" kills with no arc/artifact (asserted); L72 escapes via Kashaev 1997 (authority-external). The 4 B127 kills (K-A..K-E) verified computed-in-cited-arc (probe.py: CS loop m=1..6, null-test targets). No pre-B735 kill consulted the spectral face.

7 genuine negatives, 1 mis-class (B711: positive V4 structural resolution, not a kill). 6 kills computed-in-arc with committed scripts/outputs (post-E19 discipline); B720 is authority-external (literature sweep, arXiv-verified, no arc scripts). No P1 bases found.

6 kills verified computed-in-arc/cited-arc (B128, B130, B133-in-B132, B142, B85, K-N in-text). P1: the review-session spectral-rank cluster K-J/K-K/K-M (no arc, no committed computation; asserted). Note: B133 has no dir — its control lives in B132_quantum_layer.

5 P1: K-O class count and both B565 'earned' kills (B85 law, L38 weight-0) rest on the uncommitted journal wf_1529ebff-6c0 (test file locks only T1/T6/F2/F3); S032-A MV step hand-derived; P21 is a bare survey row. P13/P20/P22 verified in cited arcs. L345 = correction, not a negative.

9/11 walls computed-in-cited-arc (one-hop verified, scripts+outputs present). P1: WALL-1 (finite B615 null record read as universal impossibility = proxy) and WALL-7 (cites 'the rebase' prose; the exact D5 computation lives uncited in B651 cc2 packet). No pre-B735 wall consulted the spectral face.
